payload.summary: No file mutations were recorded; the completion claim is acceptable as an informational result.

sessionRecord.summary: Run ./.venv/bin/pytest in this project with PYTHONPATH=. set so the retrieval_research package is importable. Use the shell tool with: 'PYTHONPATH=. ./.venv/bin/pytest -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -80'. Report the final pass/fail/error count and the first failure (if any). Do not modify any code.
